name: kukumba
description: KuKuMBA — modular casino platform (provably-fair roulette + games catalog, RBAC admin)

pnpm.comment: Prisma engines are supplied via PRISMA_*_ENGINE env vars (proxy blocks the CDN downloader), so we do NOT run its postinstall. esbuild's postinstall is required for tsx/vitest.

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed
